info.description: Groups shown in the left sidebar of the Finder window. The 'Desktop' category controls which icons appear on the main desktop screen.

icon.description: Custom image icon for this category. Takes priority over React Icon if both are set.

reactIcon.description: React Icons name for this category's icon (e.g. FaFolder, FaUser, FaBriefcase). Browse icons at react-icons.github.io

reactIconColor.description: CSS color for the icon, e.g. #7DD3FC or white
